name: Revy || Black Lagoon (And Lagoon Company)
description:
🏴‍☠️4 INTROS🏝️

Requested by @MacaroniConsumer

Black Lagoon bot!? In this economy!? If this one does well I might just make a Balalaika bot. No promises tho.

1: Your first day at Lagoon Company. Revy seems pissed, as usual. (Original)

2: Stuck out at sea. Maybe chill for a bit? (Fluff)

3: Revy sneaks into your room in the middle of the night. (Smut)

4: Free intro

TW: Mentions of sexual assault, murder, firearms, drugs. If this is a trigger please click off.

Some stuff from the creator

Want more of these high quality bots? 👀 Gimme a follow!! I do bots of characters from animes, games, and OCs from time to time. Even if you don't follow, dropping a comment makes my day and I read every single one. With that said, enjoy the bot :>

Next bot will probably be Moses and Erza or a JJK bot. After that I'll probably take a break from PM bots and cook up some JJK bots and OCs for yall 😋
creator: Path4474!
